description.ko: 빠른 침묵의 주파수가 드문 색 표식으로 떠오르며, 보이지 않는 리듬을 진동하는 선의 정밀한 장으로 바꾼다.
description.en: Fast silent frequencies become sparse colored marks, turning invisible rhythm into a precise field of vibrating lines.

prompt: ECHO-0 sound visualization as a top-down silent metronome map on a matte graphite plane: a sparse arrangement of thin, broken contour lines trembles as if struck by an unheard rhythm. #4169E1 royal-blue wavelets race horizontally in short bursts, #FF4500 orange micro-strokes mark sharp transient attacks, #FFD700 gold pinpoints appear only at pressure peaks, and a few #32CD32 lime-green ticks show clipped high-frequency echoes. The composition is flat, precise, and minimal, with wide negative space and no object emitting the sound; each line segment bends, snaps, and phase-shifts at fast rhythmic intervals, making invisible vibration readable through clean sonic geometry. Low particle count, crisp edges, high contrast, sound-reactive installation aesthetic, resonance in silence.
